name: 绘画与材料
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 视觉艺术 / Visual Arts / Visual Arts
curriculum_points: Students will be able to explore the properties of different paints and application tools to create expressive marks and fill defined areas (K-2).
Students will be able to intentionally select and manipulate painting media and techniques to create artwork that communicates a personal response to a stimulus (3-5).
